---
❝ *Lost his family. Lost his pack. He was a lone wolf, fighting to join another pack- but it was a struggle, injured, and barely being able to eat, he was left to his own devices. That was until he stumbled upon you- now saved and taking shelter in your abode, he had no plans on leaving.* ❞

❝ *for you were his home. (whether you like it or not)(I know that's a corny phrase sorry had to say it)* ❞
